title: Day 1 Forecast Discussion
discussion:
Weak to normal thunderstorms are possible for E Poland, E Slovakia & NE Hungary.

GNRL #1
E Poland

Thunderstorms are expected for the region, they will be isolated to scattered with most of them being embedded in rain showers, the same setup as these past few days.
The main threats are:
- Small hail - up to 1cm
- Possible wind gusts (not strong)
- Heavy rain - in some places up to 35mm in 3hrs

GNRL #2
E Slovakia & NE Hungary

Early-day thunderstorms are expected for this region. They will be more scattered and unlike GNRL #1 they mostly wont be embedded in rain showers.
The main risks are:
- Small hail - up to 0.75cm
- Strong wind gusts - 75km/h possible
Also due to overlapping ingredients for tornadoes, a new tornado risk Marginal Tornado Potential was issued for the first time as an experimental risk. Its goal is to highlight an area where the basic ingredients for tornadogenesis overlap, but tornado may not form due to absence of convection or other reason.
